top_findings.summary: The skill description states its primary purpose is "auditing SCSS/CSS for hardcoded values and suggesting design tokens" but includes actions unrelated to this core function. Specifically, the "Interactive States Check" section (checking for missing hover/focus/active states and proposing CSS transitions) extends beyond the stated scope of auditing for hardcoded values and token replacements. This functionality represents feature creep into accessibility auditing and UI/UX analysis, which should be handled by separate specialized skills.
